name: Incredibly Simple Chocolate Mousse 1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (or liqueur like Kahlua, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the chocolate chips and boiling water to a blender.
2. Whisk at high speed for 15 seconds until smooth.
3. Gradually add the rest of the ingredients: egg, heavy cream, and vanilla extract (or liqueur).
4. Blend all ingredients together until well combined.
5. Pour the mixture into glasses.
6. Chill in the refrigerator until firm.
Serves 2-4. This recipe is very rich, so it's best enjoyed by a few people rather than one.
